section.title: 2.1 A Section Title That Looks Like a Footnote
section.para: A real citation to Dynamex Operations West, Inc. v. Superior Court.4 follows here.
A pincite to Family Code § 6751.1 must not be mistaken for a footnote.
See Rule 2.3 for the procedural requirement, which is not a footnote either.
A second real footnote appears here.12 and continues.
